description_long: This object is a handheld electronic controller, featuring an ergonomic grip and a prominent circular tracking ring that is studded with small sensor points. The main body is matte black, with a slightly contoured surface for comfortable handling. On the top, there is a joystick, several physical buttons, and a small trigger, all positioned for easy thumb and finger access. The circular ring, likely used for motion tracking, is attached to the front and curves around the hand, providing both protection and functionality. The overall design is sleek and modern, with a focus on user interaction and precision control. This type of device is commonly used for virtual reality or augmented reality applications in urban entertainment or simulation environments.
description: A sleek, black handheld electronic controller with a circular tracking ring and multiple buttons, designed for precise user interaction.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the ergonomic grip and the circular tracking ring, with the joystick and buttons partially visible.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the elongated handle and the profile of the tracking ring, showing the button layout and the trigger.
description_view_2: The top-down view reveals the full arrangement of the joystick, buttons, and the inner surface of the tracking ring.
description_view_3: The opposite side view displays the curvature of the handle and the attachment of the tracking ring, with the trigger and buttons in profile.
